service_project_attachment_id.description: Required. The service project attachment identifier must contain the project_id of the service project specified in the service_project_attachment.service_project field. Hint: "projects/{project_id}"

service_project.description: "Immutable. Service project name in the format: \"projects/abc\" or \"projects/123\". As input, project name with either project id or number are accepted. As output, this field will contain project number."

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
